source_pr.title: executor: add sort for union test

root_cause_explanation: UNION results can be returned in non-deterministic order. This test asserted row order without sorting, leading to intermittent failures. This PR stabilizes the test by sorting the result before checking.
fix_pattern: Sort results before assertions when result order is not guaranteed (e.g., UNION).
